ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the school */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., public, private, charter) */,
  "funding" INTEGER /* Annual funding received by the school */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Ratio of students to teachers */,
  "extracurricular_programs" TEXT /* List of extracurricular programs offered by the school */,
  "average_academic_performance" REAL /* Average academic performance of students in the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_size" TEXT /* Size of the family */,
  "parent_status" TEXT /* Parental status (e.g., living together, apart) */,
  "famsup" TEXT /* Family support for the student (yes/no) */,
  "guardian" TEXT /* Type of guardian */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Annual income level of the family */,
  "housing_type" TEXT /* Type of housing (e.g., apartment, house, rented) */,
  "neighborhood_safety" INTEGER /* Perceived safety of the neighborhood (scale 1-5) */,
  "parental_engagement" INTEGER /* Level of parental engagement in school activities (scale 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "academic_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each academic record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "G1" INTEGER /* Grade in the first period */,
  "G2" INTEGER /* Grade in the second period */,
  "G3" INTEGER /* Final grade in the course */,
  "failures" INTEGER /* Number of past class failures */,
  "teacher_feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from teachers on the student's performance */,
  "improvement_rate" REAL /* Rate of improvement in grades over time */,
  "subject_strengths" TEXT /* Subjects in which the student excels */,
  "subject_weaknesses" TEXT /* Subjects in which the student struggles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jobs" (
  "job_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each job record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "mjob" TEXT /* Mother's job */,
  "fjob" TEXT /* Father's job */,
  "job_stability" INTEGER /* Stability of the parents' jobs (scale 1-5) */,
  "job_income" INTEGER /* Annual income from the job */,
  "job_location" TEXT /* Location of the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("job_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "supports" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "schoolsup" TEXT /* Whether the student receives school support */,
  "paid" TEXT /* Whether the student pays for extra classes */,
  "activities" TEXT /* Participation in extracurricular activities */,
  "counseling_services" TEXT /* Whether the student receives counseling services */,
  "tutoring_services" TEXT /* Whether the student receives tutoring services */,
  "supportive_teachers" INTEGER /* Number of supportive teachers the student has */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_access" (
  "internet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internet access record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "internet" TEXT /* Internet access at home (yes/no) */,
  "internet_speed" INTEGER /* Speed of the internet connection at home (in Mbps) */,
  "internet_usage" REAL /* Average daily internet usage time (in hours) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("internet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_records" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health status (scale 1-5) */,
  "mental_health_status" INTEGER /* Mental health status (scale 1-5) */,
  "physical_health_status" INTEGER /* Physical health status (scale 1-5) */,
  "regular_medical_checkups" TEXT /* Whether the student has regular medical checkups */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "absences" INTEGER /* Number of absences */,
  "tardiness" INTEGER /* Number of times the student is late to school */,
  "early_dismissals" INTEGER /* Number of early dismissals */,
  "academic_impact" INTEGER /* Impact of absences on academic performance (scale 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leisure_time" (
  "leisure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leisure time record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "freetime" INTEGER /* Free time after school (scale 1-5) */,
  "goout" INTEGER /* Going out with friends (scale 1-5) */,
  "hobbies" TEXT /* List of hobbies or interests */,
  "community_involvement" INTEGER /* Level of involvement in the community (scale 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leisure_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alcohol_consumption" (
  "alcohol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alcohol consumption record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "dalc" INTEGER /* Dalc: workday alcohol consumption (scale 1-5) */,
  "walc" INTEGER /* Walc: weekend alcohol consumption (scale 1-5) */,
  "alcohol_consumption_reasons" TEXT /* Reasons for alcohol consumption (e.g., social, stress, peer pressure) */,
  "alcohol_consumption_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alcohol consumption (e.g., never, rarely, often) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alcohol_id")
)
